headline: Dupilumab Achieves Record $11.9 Billion in Global Sales Amidst Continued Growth
summary: Dupilumab's growth is driven by its established market presence, new indications like COPD, broad multi-indication use, and strong clinical performance. Recent approvals and phase III trial successes, coupled with its diverse application across conditions, create substantial market opportunities and competitive advantages.Dublin, July 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The "Dupilumab Sales Forecast, and Market Size Analysis - 2034" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering.
